name: config-sync --persist writes an options-view file containing a config object for every catalog rule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'persisted=.* total=[0-9]+ .* wrote=1' e.txt && ruby -ryaml -e 'exit(YAML.unsafe_load_file("view.yaml")["rules"].size>=118 ? 0 : 1)' && echo view-persisted 1>&2
